The '''zuxu''' was a creature native to the planet [[Ganlihk]], along with the [[ludos]] and the [[Ryless tree|ryless]]. 

==Biology and appearance==
The zuxu was able to live on land and in the water. It had a special gland that excreted a protective oil over its skin which kept it moist for 3 hours and allowed it to survive on dry land. Their front flippers were padded and could be used to walk on dry ground. Their jaws will filled with sharp teeth.<ref name="CG" />

==Behavior==
Zuxu were solitary in nature, but would occasionally band together to hunt.<ref name="CG" />

==History==
It was introduced to the planet [[Pallaxides]] for the sporting interests of [[Tagge Company/Legends|Tagge Company]] executives.<ref name="ND">[[No Disintegrations (West End Games)|''No Disintegrations'']]</ref>
